sources.title: World Bank World Development Indicators
sources.license_note: World Bank Open Data is generally available under CC BY 4.0; verify indicator-specific terms before redistribution.

sources.title: UCDP Country-Year Dataset on Organized Violence within Country Borders
sources.coverage: Global country-year data for organized violence within country borders, 1989-2025.
sources.license_or_terms_note: UCDP download center states current datasets are free of charge and licensed under CC BY 4.0 with required citation of relevant publications.
sources.citation_note: Cite the UCDP OrganizedViolenceCY version number and the UCDP GED publications requested by UCDP, including Sundberg and Melander (2013) and the current organized violence annual update.
sources.methodological_note: Used for organized violence occurring within a map unit's territory. This is not a claim of state responsibility and is not a complete civilian casualty count.

sources.title: UCDP/PRIO Armed Conflict Dataset
sources.coverage: Global conflict-year data for state-based armed conflicts, 1946-2025.
sources.license_or_terms_note: UCDP download center states current datasets are free of charge and licensed under CC BY 4.0 with required citation of relevant publications.
sources.citation_note: Cite the UCDP/PRIO Armed Conflict Dataset version number, Gleditsch et al. (2002), and the current UCDP annual organized violence publication requested by UCDP.
sources.methodological_note: Used only for state involvement in state-based armed conflict where participant fields can be mapped confidently. Location is not treated as physical territory of violence.

sources.title: UCDP Georeferenced Event Dataset (GED) Global
sources.license_or_terms_note: UCDP download center states current datasets are free of charge and licensed under CC BY 4.0 with required citation of relevant publications. The UCDP API requires an access token.
sources.citation_note: Cite the UCDP GED version number, Sundberg and Melander (2013), and the current UCDP annual organized violence publication requested by UCDP.
sources.retrieval_method: Configured for future use; the first conflict pipeline does not download GED by default.
sources.methodological_note: Event-level layer planned for later if file size and frontend use are acceptable. It should remain distinct from country-year territorial aggregation and state-involvement data.

sources.title: Natural Earth Admin 0 Countries and Breakaway/Disputed Areas
sources.license_note: Natural Earth data is public domain; review Natural Earth terms and attribution guidance before redistribution.

sources.title: Mapshaper
sources.license_note: BSD-3-Clause; verify package license for the installed version.

sources.title: OurWorldSystem mock demo data
sources.license_note: Temporary project fixture for interface development only.
sources.retrieval_method: Manually maintained static JSON in static/data/world-system.latest.json
